    WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(a.first_name, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(a.last_name, '')
    ELSE 'Unknown'

    FROM core_activitylog AS c

) AS c0

SELECT c0.id, c0.action, c0.details AS description, CASE
    WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL THEN a.username
    WHEN a0.id IS NOT NULL THEN a0.username
    ELSE 'System'
END AS admin_name, c0.timestamp AS created_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.id, c.action, c.admin_id, c.details, c.timestamp, c.user_id
    FROM core_activitylog AS c
    ORDER BY c.timestamp DESC
    LIMIT @__p_0
) AS c0

SELECT c0.id, c0.action, CASE
    WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL THEN COALESCE(a.first_name, '') || ' ' || COALESCE(a.last_name, '')
    ELSE 'Unknown'
END AS admin_name, c0.timestamp AS created_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.id, c.action, c.timestamp, c.user_id
    FROM core_activitylog AS c
    ORDER BY c.timestamp DESC
    LIMIT @__p_1 OFFSET @__p_0
) AS c0
LEFT JOIN accounts_customuser AS a ON c0.user_id = a.id
ORDER BY c0.timestamp DESC

INNER JOIN accounts_customuser AS a0 ON a.student_id = a0.id
WHERE a.method = 'PENDING' AND NOT (a.is_present)

    WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL THEN a.username
    WHEN a0.id IS NOT NULL THEN a0.username
    ELSE 'System'

    LIMIT @__p_0

    WHEN p0.payment_date = @__todayIstDate_0 AND (lower(p0.status) = 'verified' OR lower(p0.status) = 'refunded') THEN p0.amount
    ELSE 0.0

    ELSE 0.0

    WHEN p0.payment_date >= @__monthIstDate_3 AND (lower(p0.status) = 'verified' OR lower(p0.status) = 'refunded') THEN p0.amount
    ELSE 0.0

    ELSE 0.0

SELECT c0.id, c0.action, c0.details AS description, CASE
    WHEN a.id IS NOT NULL THEN a.username
    WHEN a0.id IS NOT NULL THEN a0.username
    ELSE 'System'
END AS admin_name, c0.timestamp AS created_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.id, c.action, c.admin_id, c.details, c.timestamp, c.user_id
    FROM core_activitylog AS c
    ORDER BY c.timestamp DESC
    LIMIT @__p_0
) AS c0
